name: Smoke B Fog Machine
description: The LENSGO SMOKE B is a 40W Highly Portable, Hand-Held, and Affordable, Fog Machine, designed to help you bring your creative visions to life.

features.Key Features:: The Most Portable and Powerful Smoke Machine in the World | Fits in the Palm of your Hand | Certified for Food Safety | Great for Film and Television Productions | Multiple Mist Modes | Comes with Wireless Remote Control
features.What's in the box?: 1x handheld Smoke Machine | 1x Atomising Smoke Chamber | 1x handheld Remote | 1x USB Type-C Charging Cable | 6x 12ml botles of Fog Machine liquid | 1x Straight Tube | 1x Curved Tube | 1x Pressurising Nozzle | 1x Haze Fan | 1x Cloth Bag | 1x Clearing Cloth | 1x Protective Case
